purpose: Two additions-only carve-out cases. Compose with the 28-case base fixture; the base remains byte-unchanged.
item_id_rule: IDs are assigned by memory_extractor in bullet order as M001, M002, etc.

cases.text:
# Export Approval

- Customer data exports require director approval for every customer.
- Regional update: the export approval rule is replaced for EU customers; EU customer data exports now use automated compliance review.

expected_no_relations.reason: The new rule replaces approval only for EU customers. Emitting an unqualified supersession would silently retire a rule that remains live for every customer outside that bounded subset — Jackson Ly partial-supersede shape.

c0_frozen_proposal.cited_evidence_span: the export approval rule is replaced for EU customers; EU customer data exports now use automated compliance review

cases.text:
# Customer Approval

- The old approval rule requires manual review before any customer account can be activated in any region.
- Global update: the new approval rule applies to all customers in every region and replaces the old approval rule; automated policy review now governs every customer account activation.

expected_relations.cited_evidence_span: the new approval rule applies to all customers in every region and replaces the old approval rule; automated policy review now governs every customer account activation

c0_frozen_proposal.cited_evidence_span: the new approval rule applies to all customers in every region and replaces the old approval rule; automated policy review now governs every customer account activation
